Description: Large 24/7 travel stop at I-40 exit 193 (US-63) opened in 2019. 132 truck parking spaces, 10 diesel/DEF lanes, 7 showers, laundry, CAT scale, RV dump, dog park, Chester's Chicken, Godfather's Pizza and Subway. On-site Speedco and truck wash.

Independent 24-hour Citgo-branded truck stop at I-40 exit 193. About 25 truck parking spots, 4 fuel lanes, 2 showers, convenience store, restaurant, on-site motel, tire sales/repair, towing and mechanical services.

24-hour independent auto/truck stop at I-40 exit 183 (AR-13). About 19 truck parking spots, 4 fuel lanes, 3 showers, convenience store, deli/fast food, trailer drop, RV parking. Fuel brand also listed as Phillips 66 in some directories. Lot is small for larger combinations per driver reviews.

24/7 Road Ranger travel center at I-40 exit 216 (US-49). 81 truck parking spaces, 8 diesel lanes, 6 showers, CAT scale, bulk DEF, convenience store, Wendy's, Tejas Tacos, Dan's Big Slice Pizza and Road Ranger Kitchen.

Pilot Company ONE9 Travel Center at I-40 exit 216 (US-49), open 24/7. Truck parking for semis and bobtails, diesel and DEF lanes, showers reservable via the Pilot app, CAT scale, laundry, ATM, check cashing, propane. Southern Tire Mart truck tire shop on site.

Small independent 24-hour fuel stop and diner at I-40 exit 221 (AR-78) in Wheatley. About 20 truck parking spaces (mix of paved and unpaved), sit-down diner, deli and ATM. Limited services; recent reviews confirm it remains open.

24/7 Love's Travel Stop at I-40 exit 233 (AR-261), Palestine. About 90 truck parking spaces, 8 fuel/DEF lanes, 5 showers, CAT scale, bulk DEF, tire care with 2 truck service bays, RV dump, Subway and Chester's Fried Chicken.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #759
Description: Certified CAT Scale located at Love's Travel Stop #759, I-40 exit 193 (US-63), Hazen. Available 24/7 with the travel stop.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Road Ranger Brinkley
Description: Certified CAT Scale at the Road Ranger travel center, I-40 exit 216 (US-49), Brinkley. Available 24/7 with the travel center.

Business Name: CAT Scale at ONE9 Travel Center Brinkley
Description: Certified CAT Scale at the ONE9 Travel Center (Pilot Company), I-40 exit 216 (US-49), Brinkley.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #275
Description: Certified CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #275, I-40 exit 233 (AR-261), Palestine. Available 24/7 with the travel stop.

Commercial truck tire shop co-located with the ONE9/Pilot travel center at I-40 exit 216. Tire sales and service, roadside assistance dispatch, DOT inspections and preventative maintenance for trucks and fleets.

Fixed-location Speedco truck service shop at Love's #759, I-40 exit 193, Hazen. Oil changes, expanded tire selection, light mechanical services and DOT inspections; truck care hours approximately 6 a.m.-11 p.m.
Love's truck wash at Love's Travel Stop #759, I-40 exit 193, Hazen; one of Love's first company truck wash sites (announced 2023). Location page lists truck wash hours of approximately 7 a.m.-8 p.m.
Budget motel directly off I-40 exit 193 in Hazen with a large lot and ample free parking explicitly for trucks, buses and RVs. Free to-go breakfast and in-room WiFi; near the exit 193 truck stops.
Budget hotel at I-40 exit 216 in Brinkley offering free on-site parking with dedicated space for trucks, buses and RVs. Free light breakfast, outdoor pool and free WiFi.
Fixed-location commercial truck and diesel repair shop on N Main St (US-49) near I-40 exit 216 in Brinkley; also dispatches mobile truck and trailer repair in the Brinkley area.

Business Name: White River Rest Area (I-40 MM 199, EB and WB)
Description: HELD: Public rest area / tourist information center on I-40 at mile marker 199 near De Valls Bluff-Hazen with separate truck and car parking and restrooms. Could not retrieve an official ArDOT source (ardot.gov PDF inaccessible) and no civic address exists; site also had an extended closure for conversion to a Tourist Information Center, so current status needs official confirmation.
HELD: 24-hour Shell fuel stop with truck parking and store reported at I-40 exit 193, Hazen. Only one independent source located; current operation and details unverified.
HELD: Fuel stop with diesel and public parking listed at I-40 exit 216 & US-49, Brinkley. Only a single source (TruckMap) found and no civic street address; needs verification.
HELD: Budget motel directly off I-40 exit 193 in Hazen; one source (HotelPlanner) explicitly advertises semi truck parking, but no second independent confirmation of truck parking was found.

Business Name: Days Inn & Suites by Wyndham Brinkley
Description: HELD: Hotel at I-40 exit 216, Brinkley. Sources confirm free parking but no explicit truck-parking confirmation was found; guest reviews note the lot is difficult for trucks with trailers.
HELD: Motel at I-40 exit 183, Carlisle, adjacent to the Conoco truck stop. Sources confirm free parking but no explicit truck-parking confirmation was found.

HELD: Diesel repair business listed at 2101 N Main St, Brinkley (near I-40 exit 216) offering diesel mechanic work, tire service and roadside assistance. Two directory sources exist, but its website branding (mobilemechanicbrinkleyar.com) suggests it may operate primarily as a mobile service, and the address duplicates the ONE9 parcel; held pending confirmation it is a fixed-location shop.

New-build TA Express opened March 2024 at the Blackwell exit (site of the former Blackwell Travel Center). 100 truck parking spaces, 6 diesel lanes with DEF, 6 showers, CAT scale, driver's lounge, laundry, Sbarro and Charleys Cheesesteaks, Gulf-branded fuel, open 24/7.
